code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_LedgerService] --> AppInitialization
    
    AppInitialization --> PerformanceAssessment : Start Performance Monitor
    
    PerformanceAssessment --> DeviceCapabilityCheck
    DeviceCapabilityCheck --> InitialModeSelection
    
    InitialModeSelection --> UltraFastMode : Low-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> FastMode : Mid-range Device
    InitialModeSelection --> BalancedMode : High-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> HighQualityMode : Premium Device
    
    state UltraFastMode {FinTech_AuthVault] --> QuarterResolution
        QuarterResolution --> BasicFaceDetection
        BasicFaceDetection --> MinimalProcessing
        MinimalProcessing --> LowBatteryUsage
        LowBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state FastMode {FinTech_LedgerService] --> HalfResolution
        HalfResolution --> FaceDetection
        FaceDetection --> BasicNSFWDetection
        BasicNSFWDetection --> ModerateBatteryUsage
        ModerateBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state BalancedMode {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> FullResolution
        FullResolution --> CompleteFaceDetection
        CompleteFaceDetection --> FullNSFWDetection
        FullNSFWDetection --> GenderClassification
        GenderClassification --> OptimalBatteryUsage
        OptimalBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state HighQualityMode {FinTech_FraudDetection] --> EnhancedResolution
        EnhancedResolution --> AdvancedFaceDetection
        AdvancedFaceDetection --> EnhancedNSFWDetection
        EnhancedNSFWDetection --> DetailedGenderClassification
        DetailedGenderClassification --> ContentDensityAnalysis
        ContentDensityAnalysis --> HighBatteryUsage
        HighBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    PerformanceMonitoring --> ContinuousMonitoring
    
    state ContinuousMonitoring {FinTech_AuthVault] --> CPUUsageCheck
        CPUUsageCheck --> MemoryUsageCheck
        MemoryUsageCheck --> BatteryLevelCheck
        BatteryLevelCheck --> ThermalStateCheck
        ThermalStateCheck --> NetworkLatencyCheck
        NetworkLatencyCheck --> PerformanceDecision
    }
    
    PerformanceDecision --> MaintainCurrentMode : Performance Good
    PerformanceDecision --> DegradePerformance : Performance Issues
    PerformanceDecision --> ImprovePerformance : Resources Available
    
    state DegradePerformance {FinTech_LedgerService] --> ReduceDetectionFrequency
        ReduceDetectionFrequency --> LowerResolution
        LowerResolution --> DisableNonEssentialFeatures
        DisableNonEssentialFeatures --> IncreaseCacheUsage
        IncreaseCacheUsage --> OptimizeMemoryUsage
    }
    
    state ImprovePerformance {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> IncreaseDetectionQuality
        IncreaseDetectionQuality --> HigherResolution
        HigherResolution --> EnableAdditionalFeatures
        EnableAdditionalFeatures --> ReduceCacheDependency
        ReduceCacheDependency --> EnhancePrecision
    }
    
    DegradePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    ImprovePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    MaintainCurrentMode --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    
    state AdaptiveAdjustment {FinTech_AuthVault] --> ApplyChanges
        ApplyChanges --> TestNewSettings
        TestNewSettings --> ValidatePerformance
        ValidatePerformance --> UpdateConfiguration
    }
    
    AdaptiveAdjustment --> ContinuousMonitoring : Return to Monitoring
    
    %% Emergency scenarios
    ContinuousMonitoring --> EmergencyMode : Critical Performance Issue
    
    state EmergencyMode {FinTech_FraudDetection] --> MinimalDetection
        MinimalDetection --> CriticalFeaturesOnly
        CriticalFeaturesOnly --> MaximumCaching
        MaximumCaching --> EmergencyOptimization
        EmergencyOptimization --> GradualRecovery
    }
    
    EmergencyMode --> ContinuousMonitoring : Performance Recovered
    
    %% User-triggered changes
    ContinuousMonitoring --> UserModeChange : User Changes Settings
    
    state UserModeChange {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> ValidateUserChoice
        ValidateUserChoice --> ApplyUserSettings
        ApplyUserSettings --> WarnIfIncompatible
        WarnIfIncompatible --> AcceptOverride
    }
    
    UserModeChange --> ContinuousMonitoring : Settings Applied
    
    %% Battery-specific optimizations
    ContinuousMonitoring --> BatteryOptimization : Low Battery Detected
    
    state BatteryOptimization {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> ReduceProcessingFrequency
        ReduceProcessingFrequency --> DisableBackgroundFeatures
        DisableBackgroundFeatures --> MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks
        MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks --> EnableDeepCaching
        EnableDeepCaching --> BatterySaveMode
    }
    
    BatteryOptimization --> ContinuousMonitoring : Battery Level Improved
    
    %% Thermal management
    ContinuousMonitoring --> ThermalThrottling : Overheating Detected
    
    state ThermalThrottling {FinTech_LedgerService] --> ReduceProcessorUsage
        ReduceProcessorUsage --> IncreaseProcessingIntervals
        IncreaseProcessingIntervals --> DisableGPUAcceleration
        DisableGPUAcceleration --> CooldownPause
        CooldownPause --> ThermalRecovery
    }
    
    ThermalThrottling --> ContinuousMonitoring : Temperature Normal
    
    note right of UltraFastMode
        Basic protection with minimal resource usage
        - Face detection only
        - 224x224 resolution
        - 500ms intervals
        - ~2% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of BalancedMode
        Recommended mode for most users
        - Full feature set
        - Native resolution
        - 2000ms intervals
        - ~5-8% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of HighQualityMode
        Maximum accuracy and features
        - Enhanced processing
        - Content density analysis
        - 3000ms intervals
        - ~12-15% battery/hour
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech_LedgerService设计一套完整的性能自适应状态机。核心思路是从AppInitialization开始，先做一次全面的PerformanceAssessment，然后根据设备能力动态选择运行模式。
明白了。PerformanceAssessment之后是DeviceCapabilityCheck，然后进入InitialModeSelection做分支判断对吧？我想确认一下，这个分支是基于什么维度划分的？
对，InitialModeSelection下面分出四条路径：UltraFastMode对应低端设备，FastMode对应中端，BalancedMode对应高端，HighQualityMode留给旗舰设备。每个模式内部都有完整的处理流水线。
好的，我先把四个主模式的框架画出来。UltraFastMode这边我注意到需要接入FinTech_AuthVault，走QuarterResolution到BasicFaceDetection的轻量路径，最后汇总到PerformanceMonitoring。
没错，UltraFastMode的核心就是MinimalProcessing和LowBatteryUsage。FastMode稍微复杂一点，用FinTech_LedgerService接入，HalfResolution之后做FaceDetection和BasicNSFWDetection。
BalancedMode应该是主力模式吧？我看它用FinTech_TransactionQueue，走FullResolution、CompleteFaceDetection、FullNSFWDetection，还有GenderClassification和OptimalBatteryUsage。
是的，BalancedMode是推荐模式。HighQualityMode则是顶配，用FinTech_FraudDetection，EnhancedResolution之后有AdvancedFaceDetection、EnhancedNSFWDetection，还有DetailedGenderClassification和ContentDensityAnalysis。
四个模式都画好了，每个都汇总到PerformanceMonitoring。接下来应该是ContinuousMonitoring状态？我看到里面需要监控CPU、内存、电池、温度和网络延迟。
对，ContinuousMonitoring是核心循环，用FinTech_AuthVault接入。五个检查项之后进入PerformanceDecision，这里分出三条路：MaintainCurrentMode、DegradePerformance和ImprovePerformance。
DegradePerformance和ImprovePerformance内部结构类似吗？都需要具体的调整步骤？

对，DegradePerformance用FinTech_LedgerService，走ReduceDetectionFrequency、LowerResolution、DisableNonEssentialFeatures、IncreaseCacheUsage、OptimizeMemoryUsage。ImprovePerformance用FinTech_TransactionQueue，方向相反。
画好了。DegradePerformance和ImprovePerformance都汇聚到AdaptiveAdjustment，MaintainCurrentMode也走这里。AdaptiveAdjustment内部是ApplyChanges、TestNewSettings、ValidatePerformance、UpdateConfiguration的闭环。
AdaptiveAdjustment完成后要回到ContinuousMonitoring，形成主循环。但我们还需要处理几种特殊情况：EmergencyMode、UserModeChange、BatteryOptimization和ThermalThrottling。
这些特殊情况都是从ContinuousMonitoring直接跳转的吗？触发条件分别是什么？
对，都是并行分支。EmergencyMode是Critical Performance Issue触发，用FinTech_FraudDetection，走MinimalDetection、CriticalFeaturesOnly、MaximumCaching、EmergencyOptimization，最后GradualRecovery回到监控。
EmergencyMode画好了。UserModeChange应该是用户主动切换设置的场景？用FinTech_TransactionQueue？
没错，UserModeChange走ValidateUserChoice、ApplyUserSettings、WarnIfIncompatible，如果用户坚持就AcceptOverride。BatteryOptimization是Low Battery Detected触发，ThermalThrottling是Overheating Detected触发。

BatteryOptimization内部我画了ReduceProcessingFrequency、DisableBackgroundFeatures、MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks、EnableDeepCaching，最后进入BatterySaveMode。ThermalThrottling那边是ReduceProcessorUsage、IncreaseProcessingIntervals、DisableGPUAcceleration、CooldownPause、ThermalRecovery。
所有分支最终都要回到ContinuousMonitoring。另外，给UltraFastMode、BalancedMode、HighQualityMode三个主要模式加上右侧注释，说明分辨率、检测间隔和耗电情况。
注释已添加。UltraFastMode是224x224分辨率、500ms间隔、约2%每小时耗电；BalancedMode是原生分辨率、2000ms间隔、5-8%每小时；HighQualityMode是增强处理、3000ms间隔、12-15%每小时。
检查一下ImprovePerformance的路径，你刚才说的是IncreaseDetectionQuality、HigherResolution、EnableAdditionalFeatures、ReduceCacheDependency，最后是什么？
啊，我漏了最后一步，应该是EnhancePrecision。我修正一下：ImprovePerformance的完整路径是IncreaseDetectionQuality → HigherResolution → EnableAdditionalFeatures → ReduceCacheDependency → EnhancePrecision。
对了。再确认一下ThermalThrottling的入口，是从ContinuousMonitoring直接跳过去，条件是Overheating Detected？
确认，ThermalThrottling的触发条件是Overheating Detected，恢复后通过Temperature Normal回到ContinuousMonitoring。BatteryOptimization是Battery Level Improved触发返回。
整体结构看起来完整了。最后确认一下AdaptiveAdjustment的返回路径标注：Return to Monitoring，以及EmergencyMode的返回标注：Performance Recovered。
已添加。UserModeChange的返回标注是Settings Applied，也补上了。所有状态流转和注释都完整了。
FastMode那边的ModerateBatteryUsage之后也是到PerformanceMonitoring对吧？和另外三个模式保持一致？
是的，四个运行模式（UltraFastMode、FastMode、BalancedMode、HighQualityMode）最后都汇聚到PerformanceMonitoring，然后统一进入ContinuousMonitoring。结构完全一致。
好的，这个状态机覆盖了从初始化、模式选择、持续监控、性能自适应调整，到各种异常处理（紧急模式、用户干预、电池优化、温控）的完整闭环。可以定稿了。
